/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/TRDCore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/TRDCore3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/Maxwell3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/Dirac3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/TRDEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/TRDEngine3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/TRDPipelineFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/TRDBufferManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/TRDCompute.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/TRDDescriptorManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/DiracEvolution.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/GeodesicIntegrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/output/OutputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/simulations/TestConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/simulations/TRDTestRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/src/simulations/ObservableComputer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/test/test_lorentz_force_3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/test/test_three_body_em_3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/test/test_stuckelberg_vortex_3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/test/test_geodesic_3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/test/test_weak_field_3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/test/test_em_gravity_coupling_3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/test/test_einstein_field_equations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TRD.dir/main.cpp.o -o bin/trd  libNova.a libimgui.a libPhysics.a /lib/libvulkan.so /usr/lib/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.60 -lfftw3f -lyaml-cpp -lpthread -ldl -lm
